name: Home Builder Helper
description:
A web app for homeowner to use when building a new house.  Building a new house comes with a million decisions I would like an app that will help the homeowner keep the building organized and keep the build on schedule.

Allow the homeowner to upload the design plans and/or create a new house intake form that will ask a number of clarifying questions about the new home to be built.

The helper can be split into two phases the building or the physical construction and then the design phase.
